description: Mahjong tile SVG assets for mahjong-solitaire.html
license: Self-generated original artwork (no external source, no attribution required)

man.style: Red kanji numerals (一〜九, 28px serif bold) + 萬 label (15px), centered vertically

pin.style: Blue circles (#2980b9) with white ring highlight and center dot, arranged in standard mahjong pip pattern. r=7.5(1-4), 7.0(5-6), 6.0(7-9)

sou.style: 1s: traditional bird motif (green body + orange belly + eye + one-sou label); 2s〜9s: green bamboo rods (#27ae60) with white highlight, arranged in standard mahjong pattern

wind.description: Wind honor tiles: 東南西北
wind.style: Large kanji 36px serif bold. east/west/north: #1a237e (deep indigo); south: #b71c1c (deep red)

dragon.description: Dragon honor tiles: 中(red)・發(green)・白(border)
dragon.style: chun: red 中 (#c0392b, 38px); hatsu: green 發 (#27ae60, 34px); haku: traditional empty double-bordered rectangle (#8b6914)

flower.description: Flower bonus tiles: 春・夏・秋・冬
flower.style: 6-petal SVG flower (ellipse petals, yellow center) + kanji: spring=red, summer=orange, autumn=dark-red, winter=blue

season.description: Season bonus tiles: 梅・蘭・菊・竹
season.style: season1=5-petal plum blossom(red); season2=orchid(purple); season3=12-petal chrysanthemum(amber); season4=twin bamboo stalks(green). Each with kanji label at bottom

usage: mahjong-solitaire.html — tile face rendering via or CSS background-image
notes: All SVGs are original artwork generated by Designer agent. Content validated to stay within 56x76px tile face bounds.
